rows: You were a physician, during the Salem Witch trials. You had accumulated many favors in town with your helping the sick. Because of your influence, you were embraced by the local Tremere who wanted you to spend your energies to keep magic out of the view of the common man. While you were happy to comply, it also put you right in the middle of some of the more blatant uses of thaumaturgy. Flying demons, dead fetuses raising from the graves, all things you dealt with nightly. Seeing such a dark side to what you could be you shied away from Thaumaturgy and mastered the powers to make people forget what they saw (you still make the little trinkets your mother taught you to keep the evil eye away).  Then the Malkavians decided to “prank” you putting you in a situation where everyone in court learned you barely had enough magic to tell your clan you had come in to the city. Publicly shamed the Regent of Boston, reassigned you to Los Angeles, after giving you the basics of your new path of magic.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Find a place in the court for your powers. Show them that dominate is just as vaulble as thaumaturgy
Gain enough experince in what you lack to never fail again.
Be valube enough to raise in rank and train your own students.

rows:
8/12/2016 8:35:32                Gercyon Bellingham        Tremere                
I am actively choosing not to hunt, to save that downtime.                

                <> Free feeding bc of war

Westchester See what the Malkavians are up to                                                        

                <> In Westchester it quickly becomes clear you're being watched.  Without any skills or powers to hide yourself, you attempt to escape but our quickly cornered by a group of imposing men.  One of them is a tall man with strange black eyes and his shadow seems to move of its volition. When he stares into your eyes you have a hard time remembering things. He says that from now on, you will come to this place once a month with new information on the Camarilla or the Suggestion he planted in your mind will make you burn down your Chantry. He says that Westchester is Sabbat territory now and that you work for the Archbishop now.

Asking the Chantry Archons to teach something of their choice that they haven't taught to any of the other locals since their arrival        Yes        Aiding the Chantry Archons        Yes
                                                        
                <> Samantha Lee is spending her nights at the Chantry, she agrees to begin teaching you the Path Mastery of the Mortal Shell.  It is in many ways the flip side of Dominate, the control of the body.  She asks you many questions about High Apprentice Naismith and her magic sword. Also the Archon insists that you go over the failed scrying ritual on Farrah again and again.

9/10/2016                Gercyon Bellingham        

I am actively choosing not to hunt, to save that downtime.                

        >>You will enter the game at half blood

Patrol West Los Angeles (Camarilla)        

      >>The NPM infernalist Farrah and her gang have been trying to lay down roots into Santa Monica.  While you've seen no sign of Farrah herself your patrols were able to block her mortal allies from making futher gains in your territory.                

Studying that scrying ritual that I may have messed up last month                

     >>You and Archon Lee have been spending a lot of time together, as it's quite clear she is not allowed to leave the Chantry unless with Archon Gang.  You've learned a lot about the Path Mastery of the Mortal Shell and could buy the 1st level with XP.  Also, in researching the ritual used to scry on Farrah, Archon Lee has taught you much about how infernalists manipulate dark forces to empower their Thaumaturgy, you're not sure if she should be teaching you these things but you can buy 1 dot in the Secondary skill Demonology.                          

Sabbat that wants me to leak info monthly        Yes                        

        >>This is an Interaction with a specific NPC.  ST ticket Created

10/15/2016 Herd (of my own) (no downtimes)                West Los Angeles (Camarilla)                        Farrah and company, Sabbat                                                        

>>Your patrol is uneventful

Sabbat from Westchester expecting monthly intel        Yes                        

>> Ticket created for NPC interaction

Mastery of the Mortal Shell        don't know, if I can't afford it then I add defense to West LA instead                                        

>> You were able to learn the basics of this Path before Archon Lee was attacked and put into Torpor

West LA Patrol/Defense
A large group of tremere keep a vigilant eye over their domain.  Together you stop a small gang of mortal NPM lackeys from eroding your control over your domain. 

Pasadena Assault
Seven Tremere entered Pasadena as per their agreement with the Anarch Baron.  The NPM's control of the area has been seriously eroded.                                            Will create ticket for the NPC inteaction wit the Sabbat.

West LA Patrol/Defense
A large group of tremere keep a vigilant eye over their domain. No one attempts to challenge your control

Pasadena Assault
Four Tremere entered Pasadena as per agreement with the Anarch Baron.  Your Ally is gaining control

Sabbat Meeting
Ticket created for NPC meeting

DTs

- You patrol/Defend West LA - Results TBD by Scene

- The Assault on Cathayan targets in Pasadena is very succcessful, in conjunction with Baron Greg Fasser's people you are able to root out several safe houses belonging to the NPM and their allies.  Fasser's Anarchs also mentioned that one of their people was staked and almost dragged off by an unknown Kindred, but that they were able to stop him and his description doesn't match anyone you've ever heard of. 

– The Sabbat expect more from you and ask you to steal a book from the Chantry library, a very basic tome on magic theory.  The Sabbat you met with was new and accidentally let slip that you had  "fleshcraft marks".  You're not sure what he meant by that.


Convocation Qs

During the Convocation you're approached by another young apprentice who claims that a secret society within the Tremere Clan is trying to recruit him.  He's heard of your powers of dominate and was hoping you could help him.  He believes he's been dominated to prevent him from revealing the society to others Tremere.  He is stringing this secret society along and has agreed to do a mission for them near San Diego.  If you're willing to help he could meet you in LA when you had time.

-You meet the young Tremere with the dominate problem and it becomes quite clear from your advanced powers of Dominate that he is under no such compulsion.  When you press him he admits that he freely belongs to a secret society within House Tremere and that they wish to recruit you to thier cause.  He cannot go into more detail but asks if you would help alter his memories to aid him in his secret mission in San Diego.  His secret society believes that some Tremere Antitribu of House Goratrix still exist and that they may be spear heading the Sabbat attack on San Diego. 

(1. What do we know/suspect about six locations in New York mystically linked to six in Los Angeles?
(2. Which tactics have proven most effective in defeating demons?

- Because of your rank you only get guarded answers about the exact location / nature of the 6 buildings in New York. But the prime theory you here is that they are eitherr dumping demonic energy into Los Angeles or siphoning it away to be used in ritual magic.  The High Regent of NY, Alinyse Sturbridge woudl surely know more.  As for defeating demons there are many theories, but you encounter a working group of Tremere who are more than happy to have your input since you're so close to the demon pits.  They believe lesser demons can be controlled with powerful Spirit Thaumaturgy, but that greater demons require more complex rituals and knowledge of their true names.  Your conversation with these gentlemen leads you to believe they have a lot more knowledge on this topic then they were willing to share during the convocation.

- You patrol/Defend West LA - Other results TBD by Scene

--You computer search reveals little, but you do find some video that seems to hint that the Mortal was decapitated by a physically invisible creature, and not by a mystical force or spirit.

-The young tremere contacting you in regards to a series of Sabbat blood magic rituals that were thought to have been only the possesion of followers of Goratrix is actually a Quaestor and was tested your loyalty and powers of dominate.  There was no suggestion implanted in his mind and he beleives you would e an effective candidate for the Quaestori as well.
DTs noted. Ward vs kindred can be learned next cycle from chantry library if you have high enough thaum   Influence underworld Forgers acquired.  Pls write up 1 graph on this Influence

Patrol and Defend West LA - Santa Monica and the surrounding area are easily the most well defended portion of the city.   You eoncounter no resistance or hostiles on your patrol.  The enenmy knows not to approach your territory in the open.

-You can buy Ward Vs. Kindred

-Please write up a page on how you acquired your Underworld inf 1 and 2

((EXP Cost was 17  =  Influence 2 + Blood Magic 2 + BM 3 = 2 + 6 + 9))
Has not connected on November downtimes.

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?

Both Economics actions are going to defending my Influence and Resources (level 1 block on my Resources, level 1 block on my Elite Influence).  Both Finance levels are being used to max out my income (10 mil normally, x 1.5 = 15 mil.  2 Willpower to make that happen as per usual)

Computers lvl 2 - Attempting to secure my phone as much as possible.  (As a note Eli's computer is not attached to the outside world.  He runs his finance programs, and hands off his spreadsheets via USB drives)
patrol and defense are for new chantry (Culver City, right? please correct location if needed)
1 (I think) - end goal is to learn to create and identify fake IDs
focusing on Santa Monica and Culver City as directed by Regent Patel
1 to acquire some fake IDs for the chantry members, 1 to make it harder to trace
contact Quaesitor (from Jan-Feb 2017 DTs) asking advice on cleaning up after fomori (per Cohn Rose in clan chat)

stockpile some fake IDs 
* for who you? For the chantry members?

contact Quaesitor (from Jan-Feb 2017 DTs) asking advice on cleaning up after fomori (per Cohn Rose in clan chat)
* One of the big things they say about cleaning up after formi, is try to ghoul as many people who are still alive and involved that the power of the blood will overwhelm a lot of the weaker parts of the formi taint. 

ward vs kindred bought (its only 2 xp)
Patrol South LA as part of Sheriff's quest (friend request pending, please let him know I'm helping)
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Underworld influence, ask around, what's happening in the world of crime that is important but not making the public news?
Contact Melody of Clan Malkavian (friend request pending) and request to see what she can do with computer hacking

Contact (Malkavian with bow tie, I forget the character name and don't know if the player is still playing him) to request a demo of one of his drones - if the player is no longer playing him, or if I don't have enough DTs, then ignore this one
If possible, buy off Intolerance (Malkavians) flaw, he has encountered a few who seem to be functional enough to be worthwhile
Ward Melody's tinfoil hat against lupines, and/or anything else that she requests and I can. (I can ttly ward it against demons too, my Derangement says so.)
I think I have a bonus DT, I will join Skullcrusher's hunting party to attack the Sabbat

Whatever I can ICly get and OOCly afford, in this order: Demonology 0->1 (qualified due to a past DT); Wyrm Lore 0->1; Movement of the Mind 2->3. Had trouble finding costs on wiki, I think the latter is 12, I currently have 19 unspent
Quest sheet, last month's discovery of Gio neonates killed by Sabbat, attempt to track the Sabbat and do more damage to them than us, ideally kill them
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
In patroling West LA, you descover a unsual item in a parking lot. It's a large feather that is about a foot long, but the unusual aspect of this feather is it glows in the dark.
Patroling South LA - You have found a group of hunters that are trying to track and assult the sabbat. They seem to be government based. You could try to aid them in their attack.
Reserved for quest (Stabbing at the Dark)
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Reserved for quest sheet (Stabbing at the Dark is first priority if it has enough PCs)
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
In your patrol of west la, learn about the catiffs you had investigated in the past have been attacked by the Camarilla court of los angeles.

In your patrol of South LA, you find a record of a attack like the old "mikey" attacks from last year. You have a tape of one of them attacking before finally being brought down by 4 police with shotguns.

Meet with tutor from New York (previously arranged in connection with Phoebe DuPond's visit to New York) to study Path of Technomancy. (If this opportunity has been lost, then defend South LA instead.)
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Path of Technomancy (as much as I can afford, see above)
Patrol South LA - You see massive sabbat leaving los angeles, they are fleeing to the desert.
Defend West LA - It is very quiet after the destruction of the catiffs of venice.
Reserved for Norris Michaud's quest if needed
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Incorporeal Passage (6 XP) if I can afford it; Deflection of Wooden Doom (2 XP) if I can afford it

Patrol West LA - Louis Forite has started a mass program of Ghouling Santa Monica and Bevery Hills Police officers. The method he is doing this is he gets higher ranking officers to protect movie shoots, and then he gives them free "protien drinks". In doing this he has immassed a large group of well armed retainers.

Defend West LA - You start building fake address and havens that normal people live at but you make them look like tremere safe houses so if the tremere are attacked people will have to waste resources to hurt them.
Patrol South LA - The sabbat have fully left, Havens are left empty, Reveants are fleeing the domain. You have found a plain ticket to Phenoix. You could go their to investgate more.
Reserved for quests, if not otherwise needed then defend South LA
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.

Look for useful NPCs in West LA to blood bond

Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.

Sent Laura a message to see if she wanted to RP with you, even if not I will let you by Lore Demon.

Who to bond  you find 2 choices. (1 a corrupt cop who makes fake charges to get women to sleep with him) (2 a Frelance news camraman that gets video of stuff that happens at night and sends it to the stations)
Research a variation of Rite of Introduction that can contact a specific Tremere, if successful then use it to contact Daphne Pictor and ask her to wield the feather

(if I have any left) Patrol South LA

Assisting Elizabeth Witchurch with tracking an infernalist
